title: dactylis maritima
intro: Dactylis maritima, also known as sea oat grass, is a perennial grass that grows in coastal areas, particularly in the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dactylis maritima include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing inflammation. Dactylis maritima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
